notes: The original paper states that the systematic examination was conducted between late October and mid-November 2022.
Table 1 in the paper summarizes implementation as of November 2022.
The paper reports 45 legal requirements in scope for the overall assessment.
The paper reports that 11 of 45 requirements were implemented.
The paper reports that 26 of 45 requirements could not be confirmed as implemented or not implemented.
The paper reports that 7 of 45 requirements were not implemented by the deadline.
The paper excludes one Trustworthy AI Order requirement from the overall assessment because its deadline had not yet passed.
